R2D2 character


All pattern making, mould-making casting in GRP, vacuum-forming and assembly of 9 robots for "Star Wars - The Empire Strikes Back" film.

'Cold Lazarus'


TV screenplay of Dennis Potters' last play. Filmed over 4 episodes on both BBC & ITV. Starring Albert Finney, Francis de la Tour and Saffron Burrows.

'Cold Lazarus'


Made 4 huge 'hovercraft' Police vehicles each carrying 10 fully armed policemen. Also, 4 'hovercraft' bubble Taxis
